config.site_title_prefix: Respect the Showers of Blessings from the Sky
config.site_subtitle: Showers of Blessings from the Sky
config.hero_description: Select a tweet, copy it, or post directly through your X account.

tweets.text: 💧 Every drop counts. Harvest rain, save tomorrow. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌧️ Roofs aren’t just shelters, they’re catchments. Collect rain, recharge life. #RainWaterHarvesting
🚰 Don’t let rain run away. Channel it, store it, use it wisely. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌱 Rainwater harvesting = groundwater revival. Let’s refill nature’s bank. #RainWaterHarvesting
🏠 A tank on your terrace is a vault for the future. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌍 Climate change demands local action. Harvest rain, build resilience. #RainWaterHarvesting
💡 Simple pits, big impact. Recharge wells with rainwater. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌧️ Rain is free. Water scarcity is costly. Choose wisely. #RainWaterHarvesting
🛑 Stop flooding streets. Start filling tanks. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌿 Rainwater harvesting is not an option, it’s a necessity. #RainWaterHarvesting
📉 Groundwater depletion is real. Rainwater harvesting is the antidote. #RainWaterHarvesting
🏡 Every home a reservoir, every citizen a water warrior. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌧️ Rainwater harvesting = drought insurance. #RainWaterHarvesting
🚿 Save rain today, shower tomorrow. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌱 Agriculture thrives when rain is stored, not wasted. #RainWaterHarvesting
💧 Rainwater harvesting is civic responsibility in action. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌍 Cities flood, villages dry. Harvest rain to balance both. #RainWaterHarvesting
🏠 Terrace to tank, street to sump — every path matters. #RainWaterHarvesting
🌧️ Rainwater harvesting is heritage. Let’s revive it. #RainWaterHarvesting
💡 Think global, act local: harvest rain, secure water. #RainWaterHarvesting
